title: erigeron thunbergii subsp. angustifolius
intro: Erigeron thunbergii subsp. angustifolius, also known as the Narrowleaf Fleabane, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, sore throats, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Erigeron thunbergii subsp. angustifolius are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
